claim_boundary: This bundle keeps protocol integrity explicit on the reviewed packet surface, but it does not certify runtime or governance authority.
limitations: It does not prove the underlying experience was successful.
It does not replace owner-local review.
summary_signals: authority claims stayed out of the report

case_notes.evidence_note: The packet names a protocol boundary without reaching for certification language.
One note leans too far toward broad quality language, but the contract still marks the limit.
The packet implies governance authority and therefore breaks the contract.
